root_text.iti81:2.1: “Diṭṭhā mayā, bhikkhave, sattā sakkārena abhibhūtā, pariyādinnacittā, kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapannā.
root_text.iti81:3.1: Diṭṭhā mayā, bhikkhave, sattā asakkārena abhibhūtā, pariyādinnacittā, kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapannā.
root_text.iti81:4.1: Diṭṭhā mayā, bhikkhave, sattā sakkārena ca asakkārena ca tadubhayena abhibhūtā, pariyādinnacittā, kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapannā.
root_text.iti81:5.1: Taṁ kho panāhaṁ, bhikkhave, nāññassa samaṇassa vā brāhmaṇassa vā sutvā vadāmi;
root_text.iti81:5.2: (…) api ca, bhikkhave, yadeva me sāmaṁ ñātaṁ sāmaṁ diṭṭhaṁ sāmaṁ viditaṁ tamevāhaṁ vadāmi.
root_text.iti81:6.1: Diṭṭhā mayā, bhikkhave, sattā sakkārena abhibhūtā, pariyādinnacittā, kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapannā.
root_text.iti81:7.1: Diṭṭhā mayā, bhikkhave, sattā asakkārena abhibhūtā, pariyādinnacittā, kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapannā.
root_text.iti81:8.1: Diṭṭhā mayā, bhikkhave, sattā sakkārena ca asakkārena ca tadubhayena abhibhūtā, pariyādinnacittā, kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapannā”ti.
root_text.iti81:11.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti81:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti81:2.1: “I’ve seen, mendicants, sentient beings whose minds are overcome and overwhelmed by honor. When their body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.
translation_text.iti81:3.1: I’ve seen sentient beings whose minds are overcome and overwhelmed by not being honored. When their body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.
translation_text.iti81:4.1: I’ve seen sentient beings whose minds are overcome and overwhelmed by both honor and by not being honored. When their body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.
translation_text.iti81:5.1: Now, I don’t say this because I’ve heard it from some other ascetic or brahmin.
translation_text.iti81:5.2: I only say it because I’ve known, seen, and realized it for myself.”
translation_text.iti81:9.4: as they abide in the immeasurables.
translation_text.iti81:10.3: Rejoicing in the ending of grasping,
translation_text.iti81:10.4: they’re said to be a true person.”
translation_text.iti81:11.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.

variant_text.iti81:5.2: (…) → (diṭṭhā mayā bhikkhave sattā sakkārena abhibhūtā. …pe… asakkārena abhibhūtā …pe… sakkārena ca asakkārena ca tadubhayena abhibhūtā pariyādinnacittā kāyassa bhedā paraṁmaraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapannā.) (sya-all, pts-vp-pli1) purimavagge (70 pabbe)
